metadata.description: German parliamentary-data skills powered by the abgeordnetenwatch-cli (abgeordnetenwatch.de API v2)

plugins.name: abgeordnetenwatch
plugins.description: Pull a politician's roll-call voting record, surface disclosed side income, and break down how a parliament voted on a bill — all over the open, key-free abgeordnetenwatch.de API (CC0 data) via the abgeordnetenwatch-cli.
